channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Reforming Canada's Equalization Program: A Path to Fairness and Efficiency
item.description: The article critiques Canada's federal equalization program, which aims to provide comparable services across provinces but has become outdated and inefficient. It highlights how the program, designed...

item.title: Iran's Persecution of the Baha’i Faith: A Human Rights Crisis
item.description: The article details the systematic persecution of Iran's Baha’i community under the Khomeinist regime, highlighting their marginalization as a 'dirty' religion. Baha’is face severe restrictions, inclu...

item.title: Tanzania's LNG project aims to boost economy and energy security
item.description: Tanzania is advancing a major liquefied natural gas (LNG) project in Lindi, valued at over 70 trillion shillings, which promises to transform the country's energy sector and create thousands of jobs. ...

item.description: Josephat 'CID' Bitute, a revered bullfighter in Kakamega, died under controversial circumstances, sparking a heated debate over his burial rites. Traditional leaders argued that his death did not meet...
